plugin.name: 🗺 Roadmap
plugin.description: Interactive Gantt chart of project notes driven by frontmatter (roadmap, start, end, due, defer, prerequisites, progress).
plugin.author: asktru
plugin.lastUpdateInfo: First release. Drag-schedule from a unified Gantt timeline, with hierarchy via roadmap_parent, task pills inheriting their project's icon-color, OmniPlan-style dependency arrows (project↔project via prerequisites; task↔task via NotePlan blockIDs and @after markers), ephemeral bars derived from scheduled tasks and nested subtrees, and right-click menus on every row and bar.

plugin.settings.title: Folders to Exclude
plugin.settings.description: Comma-separated folder names to exclude when scanning for roadmap notes.

plugin.settings.title: Week Starts On
plugin.settings.description: Day the week starts on in the chart header.

plugin.commands.name: Add or remove note from roadmap
plugin.commands.description: Toggle the current note's presence on the Roadmap by adding/removing the `roadmap:` frontmatter key.
